caption: A man with a short beard, wearing a white short-sleeved button-down shirt, speaks into a black handheld microphone while standing in a bright indoor setting. He gestures with his left hand as he talks, shifting his posture and expression across the sequence. Behind him is a large white banner featuring an image of himself and text in Tamil, including the phrases "பொருளாதாரத்திற்கு புதிய உயரம் தொ" and "கணந்தகுறாயா". To his left, another man stands wearing a dark vest over a light-colored shirt and a red scarf around his neck. The room has white walls and a ceiling with recessed lighting and hanging fixtures. As the sequence progresses, the speaker continues to gesture with his hand, moving it closer to his chest and changing his facial expression while maintaining his hold on the microphone.
